exercises.title: Transversal Gate Analyzer
exercises.description: Verify which gates are transversal for a given code.
exercises.expectedOutput: Transversal gate verifier for arbitrary codes
hints: Gate G is transversal if G^⊗n S (G†)^⊗n ∈ stabilizer group

exercises.title: Gate Teleportation Simulator
exercises.description: Simulate gate teleportation for S and T gates.
tasks: Prepare magic state |S⟩ = S|+⟩ or |T⟩ = T|+⟩
Verify final state is correct (S|ψ⟩ or T|ψ⟩)
hints: S needs Z, T needs S†Z correction

exercises.title: Magic State Distillation
hints: Track success rate vs input fidelity

exercises.title: Complete Gate Set Implementation
exercises.description: Implement universal gate set for a specific code.
tasks: Implement transversal Paulis for Steane code
Implement T via magic state injection
Compose gates to implement arbitrary single-qubit rotation
hints: Steane: Paulis, H, S, CNOT all transversal
Solovay-Kitaev: polylog T gates per rotation
